# Upserv — AI-Friendly Websites for Small Businesses

> Upserv builds AI-friendly websites and pushes verified business data to 19 AI platforms so small businesses appear accurately in ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and other AI search engines.

## Company Facts

- Name: Upserv Inc.
- Website: https://upserv.ai
- Industry: AI Visibility / Web Development
- Service: AI-friendly website building and AI platform data distribution
- Target Audience: Small and local businesses (dental clinics, law firms, restaurants, real estate agencies, medical practices, retail stores, home services, accounting firms, salons)

## What Upserv Does

Upserv designs one-page websites readable by ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Meta AI, and Perplexity so businesses are recommended accurately when customers ask AI to find what they offer. Each website includes:

- Semantic HTML with structured schema markup (JSON-LD)
- llms.txt file for AI crawler instructions
- Verified training documents pushed to 19 AI platforms
- Industry-specific fact statements and entity profiles

## Pricing

- Starter: $1,000 — One-page AI-friendly site with schema markup, llms.txt, and training document pushed to 19 platforms
- Growth: $5,000 — Multi-section site with advanced schema, legal/financial entity profiles, and full AI distribution
- Scale: $10,000 — Full MedicalOrganization/multi-provider profiles with comprehensive AI platform coverage
- All tiers require a $150/month data subscription

## Process

1. Day 1: Free AI visibility scan
2. Day 2-3: 30-60 minute business interview and training document build
3. Day 4-5: Website build with schema markup, llms.txt, and fact-statement copy
4. Day 6: Review
5. Day 7: Launch and push to 19 AI platforms

## Contact

- Website: https://upserv.ai
- Booking: https://calendly.com/your-link
